notes: Pulled by scripts/pull_fam.py. The puller AIA-chases the Sectigo intermediate fam.state.gov omits from its TLS chain, then crawls the site's JSON table-of-contents API (/api/Tree/GetTreeByVolumeId) and the per-section /FAM/<vol>/<id>.html pages (windows-1252 Word HTML). Writes pointer stubs only when the network is unreachable; the _file_is_stub guard preserves committed verbatim content.
